description_long: This handgun features a striking floral pattern in shades of yellow, cream, and red, set against a deep green background, covering the entire exterior. The frame and slide are both adorned with large, detailed flower motifs, giving the weapon a highly decorative and unique appearance. The grip is contoured and fully wrapped in the same floral design, with subtle ergonomic shaping visible. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, seamlessly integrated into the frame, and the slide has a squared profile with no visible external attachments or compensators. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined silhouette. No visible manufacturer markings or serial numbers are present, as the floral pattern dominates all surfaces.
description: A compact handgun fully covered in a bold, multicolored floral pattern with a contoured grip and a flush magazine base. The design is highly decorative, with no visible manufacturer markings.
description_view_0: The top and rear of the handgun are visible, highlighting the floral pattern on the slide and the back of the grip.
description_view_1: The left side of the handgun is shown, displaying the full floral motif across the slide, frame, and grip, as well as the trigger and trigger guard.
description_view_2: The rear and right side are visible, emphasizing the grip's contour and the seamless continuation of the floral design.
description_view_3: The right side and underside of the handgun are shown, revealing the trigger guard, trigger, and the flush magazine base.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured for ergonomic handling, with a smooth surface fully enveloped in a vibrant floral pattern. There are no visible finger grooves, checkering, or stippling, and the design appears to prioritize aesthetics over aggressive texturing. The grip seamlessly integrates with the frame, and no logos or embellishments are present beyond the decorative motif.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth finish and no visible undercuts or squared-off edges. It is fully covered in the same floral pattern as the rest of the handgun, and there are no integrated accessories or reinforcement features apparent.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is not externally visible beyond the slide, but the slide profile suggests a standard, non-threaded barrel of compact length. No compensators, ports, or external barrel features are present, and the exterior is fully covered by the floral finish.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The entire slide is dominated by the floral pattern, with no engravings or inscriptions apparent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and compact profile. It is fully covered in the floral pattern, with no visible finger rests, extensions, logos, or texturing.
